'''Merakai''' was a colony of the [[Khil]] species.

==History==
In response to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] shutting Khil out of numerous government jobs, the citizens of the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] [[Chrenda]] staged a mass demonstration outside a hangar facility for [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]]. In retaliation, the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] destroyed all civilian hangars in the city, and marched [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]] on a rampage through the city. This conflagration caused many Khil around the galaxy to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="GG12" />
